user.title: Battery Thresholds
user.description: Configure when tier 2 devices should be turned off and restored based on battery SOC. You can adjust these later in the integration options. Sensors (SOC, grid) can be added after setup via Configure.

data_description.tier2_threshold: When battery drops below this level, tier 2 devices (e.g. lights, refrigerators) are turned off to save power.
data_description.recovery_threshold: When battery recovers above this level, tier 2 devices are turned back on. Must be higher than shutdown threshold to prevent oscillation.
data_description.critical_soc: Below this level, a critical alert is sent. Only tier 3 devices (e.g. router, security) remain active.

notifications.title: Notification Services
notifications.description: Select which notification services should receive Battery Guard alerts. Persistent notifications are always enabled. You can change this later.

data_description.notify_services: Select one or more notification services (e.g. mobile app, Telegram). Leave empty to only use persistent notifications.

error.recovery_must_exceed_threshold: Recovery threshold must be higher than shutdown threshold

init.title: Sensors
init.description: Configure SOC and grid sensors. Add these once your PV system is integrated via Modbus. Leave empty if not available yet.

data_description.soc_sensor: Entity that reports your battery's state of charge in percent. Accepts sensors (e.g. Modbus) or input_number helpers for testing.
data_description.grid_sensor: Entity that indicates whether grid power is available. Accepts sensors, binary sensors, or input_boolean helpers for testing.
data_description.use_voltage: Enable this if you use a Shelly 3EM for grid detection via per-phase voltage monitoring instead of a grid status sensor.

voltage.title: Voltage Monitoring Sensors
voltage.description: Select the voltage sensors for each phase. A power outage is detected when all three phases drop below 50V.

data_description.voltage_phase_a: Shelly 3EM voltage sensor for phase A (L1).
data_description.voltage_phase_b: Shelly 3EM voltage sensor for phase B (L2).
data_description.voltage_phase_c: Shelly 3EM voltage sensor for phase C (L3).

thresholds.title: Thresholds & Notifications
thresholds.description: Configure battery thresholds and notification services. Changes will reload the integration.

data_description.tier2_threshold: When battery drops below this level, tier 2 devices are turned off.
data_description.recovery_threshold: When battery recovers above this level, tier 2 devices are restored. Must be higher than shutdown threshold.
data_description.critical_soc: Below this level, a critical alert is sent. Only tier 3 devices remain active.
data_description.notify_services: Select notification services for Battery Guard alerts.

error.recovery_must_exceed_threshold: Recovery threshold must be higher than shutdown threshold
